data.title: Lido DAO's price falls 6.59% to $0.94 amid market share worries despite institutional interest and technical support. ETH staking now at 25%.
data.description: The price of LDO is currently at $0.94, which represents a decrease of 6.59%. The Ethereum staking market share has dropped to 25%, leading to a bearish market trend. This is occurring despite significant recent interest from institutional investors and the presence of strong technical support.

data.title: BCE acquires Ziply Fiber to accelerate fibre growth strategy, expanding Bell's footprint. Read Caution Concerning Forward-Looking Statements for related risks and assumptions.
data.description: The acquisition discussed in this news release involves forward-looking statements. For a comprehensive understanding of associated risk factors and assumptions, refer to the "Caution Concerning Forward-Looking Statements" section later in this release. The acquisition significantly broadens Bell's fiber footprint in the United States, reflecting a strategic move for the company. Key numbers including the monetary value of the acquisition and the extent of the expanded fiber network were not explicitly mentioned.

data.title: HCI to host SPARK TALENT 2025 conference in San Antonio on Oct 7-9, focusing on workforce planning, talent acquisition & AI in HR.
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, on August 1, 2025, the Human Capital Institute (HCI) revealed details about SPARK TALENT 2025, a top-tier event focusing on recruiting and workforce strategies. The conference is scheduled for October 7-9 at the Grand Hyatt San Antonio River Walk in San Antonio, Texas. SPARK TALENT aims to bring together professionals to discuss the latest trends and best practices in talent acquisition and management.

data.title: Lucas Bols USA partners with Breakthru Beverage Group in California starting Sept 1, 2025 after exit; a major move in the spirits industry.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Lucas Bols USA, a prominent distilled spirits company, announced the selection of Breakthru Beverage Group as its new distributor partner in California starting from September 1, 2025. This decision comes as part of the company's strategic plans, marking a significant move in its distribution network. Lucas Bols USA, known for its long-standing presence in the spirits industry, aims to enhance its market reach and efficiency through this partnership. The partnership with Breakthru Beverage Group is anticipated to bring about positive outcomes for both parties, with expectations of increased sales and expanded distribution channels.

data.title: FinBe USA launches revamped franchise and dealer programs with AI & machine learning, enhancing operations.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on August 1, 2025, FinBe USA revealed the introduction of their updated franchise and independent dealer initiatives. These programs incorporate state-of-the-art artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning technologies. The company has made a substantial investment in these advancements to enhance their operations.

data.title: After GENIUS Act, stablecoin outlook analyzed by Fabian Dori of Sygnum Bank on regulatory impact, adoption, and crypto trends.
data.description: After the recent passing of the groundbreaking GENIUS Act in the US, Fabian Dori from Sygnum Bank discusses the future prospects for stablecoins, institutional acceptance, and worldwide cryptocurrency regulation. This development marks a significant step forward for the crypto industry, with potential implications for stablecoin issuance, institutional investment, and regulatory frameworks on a global scale. The passing of the GENIUS Act sets a precedent for other countries to follow suit in regulating the cryptocurrency market, with implications for the broader financial landscape. Fabian Dori's insights shed light on the potential opportunities and challenges that lie ahead in this evolving space.

data.title: Regeneron reports Q2 earnings of $12.89/share, beating consensus, with sales of $3.68B, up 4% YoY. Eylea sales decrease 25% YoY to $1.15B.
data.description: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. reported adjusted earnings of $12.89 per share in the second quarter, showing a 12% increase year-over-year and surpassing the consensus of $8.57. The company's sales totaled $3.68 billion, marking a 4% increase year-over-year and exceeding the consensus of $3.29 billion. U.S. net sales for Eylea HD and Eylea dropped by 25% year-over-year to $1.15 billion, with $393 million from Eylea HD and $754 million from Eylea. Net product sales of Eylea HD rose in the second quarter of 2025 compared to the same period in 2024 due to increased demand. Conversely, net product sales of EYLEA were negatively affected by lower sales volumes attributed to competitive pressures and a shift in market share to compounded bevacizumab because of patient affordability issues and transitioning patients to EYLEA HD.
